description: WingYip standard MCP server registry. These servers are recommended for all AI-native development across the monorepo. Register them in your OpenCode/Claude/Cursor/Copilot client configuration.

atlassian-rovo.description: Atlassian Rovo MCP Server — provides read/write access to Jira, Confluence, and Compass Cloud data. Supports searching issues, summarizing pages, and bulk-creating content via natural language.

filesystem.description: Filesystem MCP server — provides read/write access to the local file system. Enables agents to read, search, and modify files within the project workspace.

github.description: GitHub MCP server — provides access to repositories, issues, pull requests, and commits. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.

playwright.description: Playwright MCP server — enables browser automation for testing and verification of React web application features.

sqlite.description: SQLite MCP server — provides SQL query capabilities for local data analysis and SSIS pipeline debugging.
